home.title: Sudoku, rebuilt in Next.js
home.description: The Vue application has been translated into a React-based app with App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind, responsive ads, and a fully playable Sudoku board.

sudoku.title: Sudoku
sudoku.emptyState: Choose the mode and difficulty to start a new game.
sudoku.checkCellTitle: Checks whether the filled value is correct.
sudoku.autoCandidateTitle: Fills the possible candidates for each cell automatically
sudoku.shareUnavailable: Unable to generate the share link.
sudoku.controlsBoardNavigation: Navigate and select cells with the mouse or the arrow keys. Hold Shift/Ctrl or use multiselect to expand the selection.
sudoku.controlsNumberInput: Fill cells with the number buttons or the keyboard digits 1-9. Use Delete or Erase to clear the selected cells.
sudoku.controlsModeSwitch: Switch between answer and pencil marks with the space bar or the Answer/Candidates buttons.
sudoku.controlsHoverHighlight: Hovering the number buttons highlights cells and candidates that match that digit.
sudoku.controlsSearch: Use the search field to highlight patterns, candidates and regions with helpers such as contains, unique, hiddenPairs, xWing and swordfish.

status.loadFailed: Failed to load a new game.
status.unsolved: The selected puzzle could not be solved.

gameOver.title: Game Over
gameOver.description: You ran out of 3 lives in 3-Strikes mode. Review the board or start a new game.

success.title: Puzzle Complete
success.description: The board was completed successfully. You can review the solution or start a new game.

printModal.title: Print version
printModal.description: Print the puzzle in its initial state with the share link and the game QR code.
printModal.qrCaption:
Open on your phone to play online
or check the answers
printModal.unavailable: Unable to open the print window.

autoCandidatesModal.title: Auto Candidates
autoCandidatesModal.description: Apply automatic candidates only to the current selection or to the whole board?

filterHelp.title: Filter Guide
filterHelp.line1: Use `&&` to combine commands and `;` to create independent groups.
filterHelp.line2: `contains(2,3)` highlights cells that contain any of those candidates.
filterHelp.line3: `contains(candidate=2|3)` does the same with named arguments.
filterHelp.line5: `only(1,2)` highlights cells whose set is exactly that.
filterHelp.line6: `count(2)` or `count(size=2)` finds cells with exactly two candidates.
filterHelp.line7: `unique()` highlights hidden singles within the filtered universe.
filterHelp.line8: `hiddenPairs()` or `hp()` highlights hidden pairs; `hiddenPairs(pair=1|2)` filters a specific pair.
filterHelp.line9: `xWing()` or `xw()` highlights the cells that form an X-Wing; `xWing(candidate=7)` filters by candidate.
filterHelp.line10: `swordfish()` or `sf()` highlights the cells that form a Swordfish; `swordfish(candidate=3)` filters by candidate.

menu.subtitle:
🐍🔥 Challenge your reflexes and push past your limits!
Every move matters, every point is a win!
How far can you go without making a mistake?

pause.title: Game paused
pause.description: Resume whenever you are ready to continue the run.

help.desktop: Desktop: use the arrow keys to move the snake, P to pause or resume, and the space bar to trigger the speed boost.
help.mobile: Mobile: swipe across the game area to change direction and hold your touch to trigger the speed boost. The swipe respects the configured sensitivity.

share.copied: Share text copied to the clipboard (Ctrl + C).

menu.subtitle:
🧠🔥 Test your mind and push beyond your limits!
Arrange the tiles in ascending order — think fast and prove you can master the sliding puzzle!

help.line1: Click or tap a tile adjacent to the empty space to move it.
help.line2: Complete the numbers in ascending order, from 1 to the last tile, leaving the empty space in the final corner.

share.message: I solved the {size} Slide Puzzle in {time} with {moves} moves.
share.copied: Share text copied to the clipboard (Ctrl + C).
